revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Immanuelle moved page [[Talk:日鷲神社]] to [[Talk:Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)]]
Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:shrine redirects]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Shrine s]] to [[Category:Shrine stubs]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Shrine stubs
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no ja/en source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found on ja/en Wikipedia at migration time. -->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:210.249.184.60]], [[User:ja>Shikai shaw]], [[User:ja>IDCM]], [[User:ja>Yuichi Itoda]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ame-no-Hiwashi_Shrine_%28disambiguation%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
